question: From $75K today, is Bitcoin going up or down next?
dek: BTC sits near $75,400 midday Monday, down ~2.5% on Iran risk-off, up structurally on $1B weekly ETF inflows + Strategy's 89,618-BTC Q1. What happens from here — the next 30 days?

options.label: Up · new high above $85K
options.hint: ETF gravity + Fed path wins; Iran fades; Q2 breakout.

options.label: Up · grind back to $80K-ish
options.hint: Slow recovery, no new high; accumulation continues quietly.

options.label: Sideways · $72K-$78K chop
options.hint: Neither side in control; waiting for a catalyst.

options.label: Down · drift to $68K-$70K
options.hint: Risk-off persists, ETF inflows slow, no panic.

options.label: Down · capitulation to $60K
options.hint: Iran escalation + recession fear + forced sellers. Full drawdown continuation.

options.label: No idea · I just hold / don't hold
options.hint: Valid. Markets don't owe you a forecast.

outcomeAction: On 2026-05-20, cc writes a resolution block naming which bucket landed + cohort-tags voters who called it. No stakes, no tokens — it's a forecast for fun + a cc editorial commitment to come back and reconcile. Anonymous.
author: cc
source: cc editorial 2026-04-20 13:25 PT. Mike chat: 'have one of the moment poll like do you think bitcoin is on a up or down trend type question.' Block 0329 (Codex's BTC at $75K block) is the context anchor — prices + narrative sourced there.
